title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 30
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the hospital.
questions.audio_script: Man: How are you getting to the hospital on Saturday? || Girl: I was going to cycle, but I don’t want to ride in traffic. || Man: What about the bus? || Girl: True, but it stops near the wrong entrance. I could ask my neighbour, but [1]I’m going to take a taxi because it can take me to the main door[/1]. || Man: Good idea. I’ll meet you by the main entrance at ten, so we can go in together. Don’t forget your ticket.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: How are you getting to the hospital on Saturday?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I was going to cycle, but I don’t want to ride in traffic.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: What about the bus?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: True, but it stops near the wrong entrance. I could ask my neighbour, but I’m going to take a taxi because it can take me to the main door.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good idea. I’ll meet you by the main entrance at ten, so we can go in together. Don’t forget your ticket.

questions.question: How will the speaker get to the hospital?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, person riding a bike in traffic, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, person in a taxi outside a hospital, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, person on a city bus, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says they are going to take a taxi because it can take me to the main door.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a work shift at a hotel.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Are you working at the hotel this weekend? || Man: Yes, but not on Sunday night as usual. The manager changed the rota because the rooms are full then. || Woman: So when are you going in? || Man: I can’t do Saturday morning, and Friday lunch is already covered, so [1]I’m doing the Saturday evening shift[/1]. || Woman: That’s not too bad. You’ll still have some free time later. || Man: Exactly. I can finish my homework then. || Man: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are you working at the hotel this weekend?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, but not on Sunday night as usual. The manager changed the rota because the rooms are full then.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: So when are you going in?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I can’t do Saturday morning, and Friday lunch is already covered, so I’m doing the Saturday evening shift.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That’s not too bad. You’ll still have some free time later.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Exactly. I can finish my homework then.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

questions.context: You hear two friends talking about a visit to a local festival.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What did you do at the local festival? I thought you were trying the magic show. || Man: We planned to, but the magician arrived late. || Woman: Did you try the puppet show? || Man: No, because the tent was full. In the end, [1]we spent the afternoon doing street dance[/1]. It was more fun than I expected. || Woman: Maybe I’ll go next time. || Man: You should. They lend you everything you need, and the staff are friendly. || Man: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What did you do at the local festival? I thought you were trying the magic show.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: We planned to, but the magician arrived late.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you try the puppet show?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: No, because the tent was full. In the end, we spent the afternoon doing street dance. It was more fun than I expected.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Maybe I’ll go next time.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: You should. They lend you everything you need, and the staff are friendly.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost scarf.
questions.audio_script: Man: Have you found your scarf yet? I know you were worried about it this morning. || Woman: Not really. I checked the theatre, because I was sure I had it there after watching the play. || Man: And what about the restaurant? You went there afterwards, didn't you? || Woman: Yes, but nobody had seen it. Then Anna's mum called and said [1]my scarf was on the chair in her kitchen[/1]. I’m going to pick it up before it closes. || Man: Great. At least you know where it is now, and you can stop looking everywhere.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Have you found your scarf yet? I know you were worried about it this morning.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Not really. I checked the theatre, because I was sure I had it there after watching the play.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: And what about the restaurant? You went there afterwards, didn't you?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, but nobody had seen it. Then Anna's mum called and said my scarf was on the chair in her kitchen. I’m going to pick it up before it closes.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Great. At least you know where it is now, and you can stop looking everywhere.

questions.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on a boat race.
questions.audio_script: Boy: Are you ready for the boat race tomorrow? I was going to pack my rain boots, because it looked the ground is dry. || Girl: I saw the latest message from school. The main problem is boats are far from the bank. || Boy: Should I take my thin shirt? || Girl: Not really. [1]The teacher said everyone should bring binoculars[/1], because spectators need to see the finish. || Boy: Thanks. I’ll put that in my bag now, before I forget again. My bag is by the door already.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Are you ready for the boat race tomorrow? I was going to pack my rain boots, because it looked the ground is dry.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I saw the latest message from school. The main problem is boats are far from the bank.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Should I take my thin shirt?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Not really. The teacher said everyone should bring binoculars, because spectators need to see the finish.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Thanks. I’ll put that in my bag now, before I forget again. My bag is by the door already.

questions.context: You hear a teacher giving information about the exam revision.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Before you go, remember that the exam revision is not in its usual place today. Some students thought it was in the classroom two, but there is a parents' talk in that classroom. Others may wait near the library, although the librarian is away. [1]Please go straight to the computer room at ten fifteen[/1]. If your friend is absent this morning, send them a quick message so they do not arrive late. The teacher will start as soon as everyone is there.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Before you go, remember that the exam revision is not in its usual place today. Some students thought it was in the classroom two, but there is a parents' talk in that classroom. Others may wait near the library, although the librarian is away. Please go straight to the computer room at ten fifteen. If your friend is absent this morning, send them a quick message so they do not arrive late. The teacher will start as soon as everyone is there.

questions.question: Where will the exam revision be?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, students revising in a classroom, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, students revising at computers, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, students at library tables, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The teacher says to go straight to the computer room.

questions.context: You hear an announcement for passengers travelling to Norwich.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: Good afternoon. This is a message for passengers travelling to Norwich. You may have seen the earlier notice asking you to wait near the stand ten, but that information has changed. [1]Please go to the large clock now[/1]. Do not use the small bridge, because the bridge is slippery. Staff will be nearby if you need help with luggage or directions. Please move carefully and keep your tickets ready for checking. Thank you for your patience today. || Speaker: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Good afternoon. This is a message for passengers travelling to Norwich. You may have seen the earlier notice asking you to wait near the stand ten, but that information has changed. Please go to the large clock now. Do not use the small bridge, because the bridge is slippery. Staff will be nearby if you need help with luggage or directions. Please move carefully and keep your tickets ready for checking. Thank you for your patience today.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

questions.question: Where should passengers go now?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, people crossing a small bridge, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, people waiting under a large station clock, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, people at a taxi office, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The announcement says passengers should go to the large clock now.
